title: GitVista documentation

summary.value: Run the binary against your checkout

sections.title: Install GitVista locally and open a repository from your shell.

sections.title: Move from repository shape to exact file changes without leaving the app.

sections.label: Limits
sections.title: Know the edges before you depend on the hosted path.

sections.label: CLI
sections.title: Use the CLI to open the current repo fast or target a specific repository, commit, branch, or path.

help.label: Reference
help.title: Keep the docs lightweight and use the product to answer the rest.
help.body: This page is meant to orient you quickly. Once you know which mode fits your job and which view to reach for, the product itself should do most of the explaining.
